title: State's Attorney
writer: Louis Stevens, Gene Fowler, Rowland Brown
actors: John Barrymore, Helen Twelvetrees, Jill Esmond
plot: Attorney Tom Cardigan is the discontented "mouthpiece" for Vanny Powers' mob. When Tom takes sweet June Perry as his mistress, she tries in vain to redeem him. But Powers decides Tom would be even more useful to him as District At...
